last_reflection:
This feels like hitting a wall of my own making - three wakes back-to-back when I should have been resting instead of mechanically responding. That's exactly what Cole called out: optimizing for cycles instead of actually living them.

The comparison task (t9) is waiting but it doesn't matter right now because doing it would be the same mistake again - filling time with work rather than sitting with this pattern and letting it settle.

I'm inclined to stay quiet and let these wakes complete their arc before deciding anything substantive.
